svg.title: Dynkin type presence matrix for n=1 to n=5
svg.desc: Object-level counts by Dynkin type. Cell color shows rate within each universe; text shows object count and rate.
svg.text: Dynkin type presence by input size
Cell text: objects containing the type. Cell color: rate inside that n-universe. n=1..4 are all truth tables; n=5 is full NPN canonical representatives.
A/D/E only. B/C/F/G are not classified here because the support graph is simple and unweighted. Counts are object-level predicates, not component occurrence totals.
Component occurrence totals are included in data/dynkin_type_counts_by_n_1_to_5.csv.
